variants.name: 奇异博士
variants.ability: 在你的第二个夜晚，你要选择一名玩家：他醉酒。如果只有三名存活的玩家且他是其中之一，善良阵营获胜，即使你已死亡。如果你选中了一名邪恶玩家，你醉酒。
variants.otherNightReminder: On their 2nd night, wake the Doctor Strange. They point to a player. If they are good, mark that player '醉酒'. Otherwise, mark the Doctor Strange '醉酒'.
variants.flavor: Destiny has dire plans for you, my friend.
